name: Explore Lattice Data
description: Budget-controlled read of lattice data. Returns JSON5 with structural annotations, truncated to fit the byte budget. Use this for exploring large or unknown data structures without overwhelming context. Paths use '/' separators (e.g. 'w/vendors', 'n/notes', 'g/my-agent/timeline'). Namespaces: g = agents, w = workspace, o = operations, n = agent workspace (agent scope only). For multiple paths, pass an array — each gets an equal share of the budget. Returns a single string for one path, or a map of path → rendered value for multiple paths.

paths.description: Path or array of paths to explore. E.g. 'w/vendors' or ['w/vendors/a', 'w/vendors/b'].

budget.description: Byte budget for the rendered output (default 500). Larger budgets show more detail.

compact.description: If true, render single-line output (default). If false, pretty-print with indentation.

result.description: Rendered JSON5 string (single path) or map of path → rendered value (multiple paths)
